message:
fix: use calling tmux socket in gt cycle to fix cross-socket cycling

gt cycle was silently failing because InitRegistry sets the default tmux
socket to the town name ("gt"), but crew sessions live on the "default"
socket. When run-shell invokes gt cycle, it was using -L gt which can't
see sessions on the default socket.

Fix: at the start of cycleToSession, read the TMUX env var (set by
run-shell to the calling server's socket path and override the default
socket. This ensures gt cycle operates on the same tmux server that
triggered the keybinding.

Also adds SocketFromEnv() helper to extract socket name from TMUX env.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)
